IS THE WEBPAGE VALID AND RELEVANT?
Below you will find a search query that a user has entered into the search box of a search engine.
On the right you will also find a web page with its url on the top. If the web page does not render correctly, click on the web page's link to see it in a new window.
For this task you will help identify if the webpage is valid and relevant.
The webpage is valid if:
It is accessible, meaning that it opens either on the task page or after opening it manually
Its content is available after opening the webpage
It does not contain anything inappropriate like bad language, offensive images etc.
The webpage is relevant if its content is related to the given search query and if it expresses a search purpose of the query.
Answer 'Yes' if the webpage is valid and relevant, 'No' otherwise.
Search query:"williams and sons"
show in Bing, show in Google
The webpage is valid and relevant:
Yes
No
Web page: https://williamsandson.net/
No
